projectDescription: Canonical's design system toolkit providing React and Svelte components, CSS styles, design tokens, and developer tooling for building consistent user interfaces across Canonical's web properties.
keyFeatures: React 19 and Svelte 5 component libraries with tiered architecture (Global, App, Domain-specific)
Pure CSS design system with layered style packages and CSS custom property tokens
Modifier family type system for consistent component variants (severity, density, intent)
react-hook-form integration with extensible custom fields and middleware
Architecture validation via webarchitect with JSON Schema rulesets
Yeoman/Summon generators for scaffolding components and packages following conventions
Storybook per-package with Chromatic visual regression testing
Monorepo with Lerna fixed versioning and Nx task caching
publicApiSurface: @canonical/react-ds-global: Accordion, Badge, Breadcrumbs, Button, Card, Chip, Icon, Label, Link, Rule, Section, SkipLink, Tile, Timeline, Tooltip
@canonical/utils: debounce, throttle, invariant, casing utilities, pluralize, humanizeNumber
@canonical/webarchitect: CLI with library, tool, tool-ts rulesets
summon CLI: component and package scaffolding generators
